column2: Model_3 <- brms::brm(n_green | trials(N_pixel) ~ Year + s(JulianDay, by = Year) + (1|Plot),
saveRDS(Model_3, "greening_M3.RDS") ## so u dont need to rerun again
G2;H2;Warningh: There were 7 divergent transitions after warmup. Increasing adapt_delta above 0.8 may help. See http://mc-stan.org/misc/warnings.html#divergent-transitions-after-warmupg
n_green | trials(N_pixel) ~ Year + s(JulianDay, by = Year) + (1 | Plot)

Draws: 3 chains, each with iter = 2000; warmup = 500; thin = 1;
         total post-warmup draws = 4500

For each parameter, Bulk_ESS
and Tail_ESS are effective sample size measures, and Rhat is the potential
scale reduction factor on split chains (at convergence, Rhat = 1).
#bulk and Tail TSS is sample effect size and must be higher than 1000 and Rhat should be 1 if converged well
plot(Model_3) ## should be a fuzzy caterpillar pattern for good convergence
